rules.sourceTitle: Database - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: The EU Additives Database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.
rules.evidenceQuote: This database can serve as a tool to inform about the food additives approved for use in food in the EU and their conditions of use. It is based on the Union list of food additives. This list is in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

rules.parameter: Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
rules.sourceTitle: Microbiological criteria - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.
rules.evidenceQuote: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 on microbiological criteria for foods, applicable from 1 January 2006, lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites, such as Salmonella , Listeria monocytogenes , Enterobacter sakazakii , staphylococcal enterotoxins and histamine in specific foods.

rules.sourceTitle: Microbiological criteria - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: Guidance documents are available for conducting shelf-life studies and sampling procedures for Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods to comply with the food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.
rules.evidenceQuote: The Technical guidance document on shelf-life studies for Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods provides specialised laboratories with detailed and practical information on how to conduct shelf-life studies... in order to comply with the food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

rules.sourceTitle: Jaringan Dokumentasi dan Informasi Hukum Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan RI
rules.notes: Specific limits for food additives in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.sourceTitle: Jaringan Dokumentasi dan Informasi Hukum Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan RI
rules.notes: Requirements for allergen declaration on processed food labels, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.sourceTitle: Jaringan Dokumentasi dan Informasi Hukum Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan RI
rules.notes: Specific contaminant limits for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.sourceTitle: PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan
rules.notes: Food categories for processed products, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified according to PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019, which is a foundational regulation for applying other specific rules.
rules.evidenceQuote: PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan

rules.sourceTitle: Jaringan Dokumentasi dan Informasi Hukum Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan RI
rules.notes: General labelling requirements for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.sourceTitle: Jaringan Dokumentasi dan Informasi Hukum Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan RI
rules.notes: Specific microbiological limits for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.notes: Specific limits or guidelines for salt/sodium content in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against relevant regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

rules.sourceTitle: Ministry of Health and Welfare (MOHW) Laws and Regulations Search System / National Laws and Regulations Database
rules.notes: Specific limits for food additives in seasoning, snack food, and processed foods must be verified in the official laws and regulations databases maintained by the Ministry of Health and Welfare, which oversees the Taiwan Food and Drug Administration (TFDA).
rules.evidenceQuote: 衛生福利法規檢索系統; 全國法規資料庫; 食品藥物管理署

rules.sourceTitle: Ministry of Health and Welfare (MOHW) Laws and Regulations Search System / National Laws and Regulations Database
rules.notes: The mandatory allergen declaration list and related requirements for seasoning, snack food, and processed foods must be verified in the official laws and regulations databases maintained by the Ministry of Health and Welfare, which oversees the Taiwan Food and Drug Administration (TFDA).
rules.evidenceQuote: 衛生福利法規檢索系統; 全國法規資料庫; 食品藥物管理署

rules.sourceTitle: Ministry of Health and Welfare (MOHW) Laws and Regulations Search System / National Laws and Regulations Database
